implementation_checklist: Enforce strict provenance and taint controls
Trace each integrated requirement to a verification signal

traceability_matrix.statement: Efficiency objective for Library: Librarians must be able to add new books, remove books, and manage member accounts
The system shall ensure efficiency (throughput stability): The system must enforce borrowing limits (e
The system shall ensure responsibility (regulatory accountability): Members must be able to search for books by title, author, or ISBN
The system shall ensure safety (risk mitigation): The system must enforce borrowing limits (e.g., maximum number of books per member).
The system shall ensure sustainability (resource lifecycle control): , maximum number of books per member) and track overdue books
The system shall ensure trustworthiness (security assurance): The system must track which books are available, which are borrowed, and by whom
The system shall ensure trustworthiness (integrity guarantees): A library management system must allow library members to borrow and return books
